how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three steps to take your agent live.

step1.title: Create your agent
step1.desc: Pick the model, tone and system prompt. Connect your own API key.

step2.title: Feed it
step2.desc: Upload your documents for precise answers grounded in your own data.

step3.title: Deploy everywhere
step3.desc: Website widget, WhatsApp channel, voice messages: one agent, many channels.

items.q: Do I need my own API key?
items.a: You can use your own API key for each agent, or the platform key depending on your plan. Your keys are encrypted and never exposed in clear text.

items.q: Can I embed the agent on any website?
items.a: Yes. The widget embeds with a simple two-line JavaScript snippet, on any website or CMS.

items.q: How does the WhatsApp channel work?
items.a: You connect your own WhatsApp Business account (Meta Cloud API). Your agent then automatically replies to incoming messages, based on your subscription.
Depending on your plan, incoming voice messages are automatically transcribed and then handled as text by the agent.
Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade whenever you want from your dashboard.

finalCta.title: Ready to launch your AI agent?
finalCta.subtitle: Start for free, no credit card required.

about.title: About MjimsAI
about.subtitle: We make conversational AI accessible to every business, without the technical complexity.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: MjimsAI lets any business deploy a reliable AI agent, grounded in its own data, across every channel — website, WhatsApp and beyond. We believe building a smart assistant should take minutes, not months.

v1.title: Freedom of choice
v1.desc: Multi-provider by design: use the model and API key that suit you, with no lock-in.

v2.title: Security first
v2.desc: Encrypted keys, signed webhooks, per-tenant isolation. Your data and your customers' data stay protected.

v3.title: Accessible everywhere
v3.desc: Multilingual and multi-channel, built for Europe and West Africa alike.

tech.title: Our technology
tech.body: Built on a modern stack — FastAPI, Next.js and the best language models available. An architecture designed for reliability, performance and compliance.
